notes: This file normalizes publicly available SMB4 player-facing ratings, metadata, chemistry types, and traits.
Traits marked with chemistry_scaled=true are documented as scaling with team chemistry.
Pitchers publicly expose batting and fielding-style attributes in roster databases in addition to pitcher-specific ratings.

sources.name: ClutchPoints - Super Mega Baseball 4: Full Traits List
sources.purpose: Trait names, categories, descriptions, chemistry scaling note

sources.name: Redundant Robot SMB4 roster pages
sources.purpose: Observed player rating columns, pitcher metadata, roster field schema

pitch_rv_per_100.notes: Pitch run value per 100 pitches from Statcast pitch-type leaderboards. Negative values are better.

oaa.notes: Outs Above Average from Baseball Savant OAA leaderboard. League median is 0. Elite defenders reach +15 to +20.

drs.notes: Defensive Runs Saved from FanGraphs fielding leaderboard. League median is 0. Elite defenders reach +15 to +20.

uzr.notes: Ultimate Zone Rating from FanGraphs fielding leaderboard. League median is 0. Elite defenders reach +12 to +18.

position_player_attributes.label: Arm
position_player_attributes.description: Throwing strength and speed rating for non-pitchers.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Cannon Arm
non_pitcher_positive.description: Increased throw speed when throwing with maximum power from the throwing minigame.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Durable
non_pitcher_positive.description: Reduced chance of injury during play and slower fitness decay from being overplayed.

non_pitcher_positive.name: First Pitch Slayer
non_pitcher_positive.description: Increased power and contact on a 0-0 count.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Sprinter
non_pitcher_positive.description: Increased running speed while running out of the batter's box.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Tough Out
non_pitcher_positive.description: Increased contact when batting with a 2-strike count.

non_pitcher_positive.name: CON vs LHP
non_pitcher_positive.description: Increased contact when batting versus a left-handed pitcher.

non_pitcher_positive.name: CON vs RHP
non_pitcher_positive.description: Increased contact when batting versus a right-handed pitcher.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Dive Wizard
non_pitcher_positive.description: Faster recoveries from diving catches.

non_pitcher_positive.name: POW vs LHP
non_pitcher_positive.description: Increased power when batting versus a left-handed pitcher.

non_pitcher_positive.name: POW vs RHP
non_pitcher_positive.description: Increased power when batting versus a right-handed pitcher.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Rally Starter
non_pitcher_positive.description: Increased contact when trailing and batting with bases empty.

non_pitcher_positive.name: RBI Hero
non_pitcher_positive.description: Increased power and contact when batting with a runner on second or third.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Base Rounder
non_pitcher_positive.description: Increased running speed while rounding a base.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Consistent
non_pitcher_positive.description: Mojo changes at a slower rate from play to play and game to game.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Fastball Hitter
non_pitcher_positive.description: Swing power and contact improve when swinging at a 4F, 2F, or CF pitch.

non_pitcher_positive.name: High Pitch
non_pitcher_positive.description: Swing power and contact improve when targeting the upper half of the strike zone.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Inside Pitch
non_pitcher_positive.description: Swing power and contact improve when targeting the inside half of the strike zone.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Low Pitch
non_pitcher_positive.description: Swing power and contact improve when targeting the lower half of the strike zone.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Magic Hands
non_pitcher_positive.description: Reduced chance of a missed catch when jumping, diving, or sliding.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Off-Speed Hitter
non_pitcher_positive.description: Swing power and contact improve when swinging at a CB, SL, CH, SB, or FK pitch.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Outside Pitch
non_pitcher_positive.description: Swing power and contact improve when targeting the outside half of the strike zone.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Volatile
non_pitcher_positive.description: Mojo changes at a faster rate from play to play and game to game.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Pinch Perfect
non_pitcher_positive.description: Increased power and contact when pinch hitting.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Ace Exterminator
non_pitcher_positive.description: Increased power and contact when batting against an A- pitcher or better.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Big Hack
non_pitcher_positive.description: Increased power and reduced contact in 2-0, 3-0, and 3-1 counts.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Bunter
non_pitcher_positive.description: Bunting balls down the foul line is easier.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Little Hack
non_pitcher_positive.description: Increased contact and reduced power in 0-1, 0-2, and 1-2 counts.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Utility
non_pitcher_positive.description: No fielding penalty when playing at a secondary position.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Clutch
non_pitcher_positive.description: Increase to all skills when pressure is high. The effect is doubled when pressure is extreme.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Bad Ball Hitter
non_pitcher_positive.description: Reduced batted ball speed penalty when making contact with pitches on the corners or outside of the strike zone.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Distractor
non_pitcher_positive.description: While on first or second and the next base is open, the opposing pitcher suffers reduced accuracy.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Mind Gamer
non_pitcher_positive.description: While batting, the opposing pitcher suffers reduced accuracy.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Sign Stealer
non_pitcher_positive.description: Increased chance of receiving an audio and visual cue of whether a fastball or off-speed pitch is coming.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Stealer
non_pitcher_positive.description: Increased running speed while attempting to steal a base.

non_pitcher_positive.name: Stimulated
non_pitcher_positive.description: Increased chance of mojo becoming Juiced for the final 2.5 innings.

non_pitcher_negative.name: First Pitch Prayer
non_pitcher_negative.description: Reduced power and contact on a 0-0 count.

non_pitcher_negative.name: Injury Prone
non_pitcher_negative.description: Increased chance of injury during a play and faster fitness decay from being overplayed.

non_pitcher_negative.name: Noodle Arm
non_pitcher_negative.description: Decreased throw speed when throwing with less than maximum power from the throwing minigame.

non_pitcher_negative.name: Slow Poke
non_pitcher_negative.description: Decreased running speed while running out of the batter's box.

non_pitcher_negative.name: Whiffer
non_pitcher_negative.description: Reduced contact when batting with a 2-strike count.

non_pitcher_negative.name: Choker
non_pitcher_negative.description: All skills are reduced when pressure is high. The effect is doubled when pressure is extreme.

non_pitcher_negative.name: RBI Zero
non_pitcher_negative.description: Reduced power and contact when batting with a runner on second or third.

non_pitcher_negative.name: Base Jogger
non_pitcher_negative.description: Decreased running speed while rounding a base.

non_pitcher_negative.name: Butter Fingers
non_pitcher_negative.description: Increased chance of a missed catch when jumping, diving, or sliding.

non_pitcher_negative.name: Bad Jumps
non_pitcher_negative.description: Decreased running speed while attempting to steal a base.

non_pitcher_negative.name: Easy Target
non_pitcher_negative.description: While batting, the opposing pitcher gains increased accuracy.

non_pitcher_negative.name: Wild Thrower
non_pitcher_negative.description: Increased chance of committing an errant or disastrous throw, regardless of throwing minigame outcome.

pitcher_positive.name: Durable
pitcher_positive.description: Reduced chance of injury during play and slower fitness decay from being overplayed.

pitcher_positive.name: K Collector
pitcher_positive.description: Increased velocity and junk when pitching with a 2-strike count.

pitcher_positive.name: Workhouse
pitcher_positive.description: Stamina decreases at a slower rate.

pitcher_positive.name: Clutch
pitcher_positive.description: Increases to all skills when pressure is high. The effect is doubled when pressure is extreme.

pitcher_positive.name: Rally Stopper
pitcher_positive.description: Increased velocity, junk, and accuracy when pitching with at least two runners on base.

pitcher_positive.name: Two Way (C)
pitcher_positive.description: Reduced fielding and arm penalties when playing catcher.

pitcher_positive.name: Two Way (IF)
pitcher_positive.description: Reduced fielding and arm penalties when playing in the infield.

pitcher_positive.name: Two Way (OF)
pitcher_positive.description: Reduced fielding and arm penalties when playing in the outfield.

pitcher_positive.name: Composed
pitcher_positive.description: Increased accuracy when pitching with a 3-ball count.

pitcher_positive.name: Consistent
pitcher_positive.description: Mojo changes at a slower rate from play to play and game to game.

pitcher_positive.name: Metal Head
pitcher_positive.description: Increased chance of instantly recovering from a comebacker to the head.

pitcher_positive.name: Volatile
pitcher_positive.description: Mojo changes at a faster rate from play to play and game to game.

pitcher_positive.name: Elite 4F
pitcher_positive.description: Increased pitch speed when pitching a 4-seam fastball.

pitcher_positive.name: Elite 2F
pitcher_positive.description: Increased movement and life when pitching a 2-seam fastball.

pitcher_positive.name: Elite CF
pitcher_positive.description: Increased cut and late action when pitching a cut fastball.

pitcher_positive.name: Elite CB
pitcher_positive.description: Increased break when pitching a curveball.

pitcher_positive.name: Elite CH
pitcher_positive.description: Decreased pitch speed and increased break when pitching a change-up.

pitcher_positive.name: Elite FK
pitcher_positive.description: Increased dive and late drop when pitching a forkball.

pitcher_positive.name: Elite SL
pitcher_positive.description: Increased pitch speed and break when pitching a slider.

pitcher_positive.name: Elite SB
pitcher_positive.description: Increased bend and deception when pitching a screwball.

pitcher_positive.name: Gets Ahead
pitcher_positive.description: Increased accuracy on a 0-0 count.

pitcher_positive.name: Pick Officer
pitcher_positive.description: While pitching, opposing baserunners suffer decreased running speed when attempting to steal a base.

pitcher_positive.name: Reverse Splits
pitcher_positive.description: While pitching, opposite-handed opposing batters suffer reduced power and contact.

pitcher_positive.name: Specialist
pitcher_positive.description: While pitching, same-handed opposing batters suffer reduced power and contact.

pitcher_positive.name: Stimulated
pitcher_positive.description: Increased chance of mojo becoming Juiced for the final 2.5 innings.

pitcher_negative.name: K Neglecter
pitcher_negative.description: Reduced velocity and junk when pitching with a 2-strike count.

pitcher_negative.name: Injury Prone
pitcher_negative.description: Increased chance of injury during a play and faster fitness decay from being overplayed.

pitcher_negative.name: Choker
pitcher_negative.description: Reduction to all skills when pressure is high. The effect is doubled when pressure is extreme.

pitcher_negative.name: Meltdown
pitcher_negative.description: Reduced accuracy for the remainder of the inning after four consecutive batters reach base with no outs recorded.

pitcher_negative.name: Surrounded
pitcher_negative.description: Reduced velocity, junk, and accuracy when pitching with at least two runners on base.

pitcher_negative.name: Wild Thing
pitcher_negative.description: Increased error in pitch location when holding a power pitch for too long.

pitcher_negative.name: BB Prone
pitcher_negative.description: Reduced accuracy when pitching with a 3-ball count.

pitcher_negative.name: Crossed Up
pitcher_negative.description: Increased chance of the catcher dropping or failing to cleanly catch the pitch.

pitcher_negative.name: Easy Jumps
pitcher_negative.description: While pitching, opposing baserunners gain increased running speed when attempting to steal a base.

Utility.description: Award when a non-pitcher can cover all positions in at least one configured position group.

First Pitch Slayer.description: Award when first-pitch hitting is a clear situational strength.

First Pitch Prayer.description: Award when first-pitch hitting is a clear situational weakness.

CON vs LHP.description: Award when contact production is meaningfully better versus left-handed pitching.

CON vs RHP.description: Award when contact production is meaningfully better versus right-handed pitching.

POW vs LHP.description: Award when power plays much better against left-handed pitching.

POW vs RHP.description: Award when power plays much better against right-handed pitching.

Dive Wizard.description: Award when dive and recovery performance is well above average.

Butter Fingers.description: Award when handling and recovery on difficult plays is clearly poor.

Rally Starter.description: Award when batting with empty bases while trailing is a meaningful strength.

RBI Hero.description: Award when production with runners in scoring position is a clear strength.

RBI Zero.description: Award when run-producing situational hitting is a clear weakness.

Fastball Hitter.description: Award when the hitter handles fastballs exceptionally well.

Off-Speed Hitter.description: Award when the hitter handles breaking and off-speed pitches exceptionally well.

High Pitch.description: Award when the hitter performs especially well in the upper part of the zone.

Low Pitch.description: Award when the hitter performs especially well in the lower part of the zone.

Inside Pitch.description: Award when the hitter performs especially well on inside pitches.

Outside Pitch.description: Award when the hitter performs especially well on outside pitches.

Consistent.description: Award when performance consistency is clearly above average.

Volatile.description: Award when performance consistency is clearly below average.

Ace Exterminator.description: Award when production against ace-level pitching is a real strength.

Bunter.description: Award when bunting skill or value is clearly above average.

Pinch Perfect.description: Award when pinch-hitting results are clearly above average.

Clutch.description: Award when high-leverage performance is clearly above average.

Choker.description: Award when high-leverage performance is clearly below average.

Distractor.description: Award when baserunning pressure consistently disrupts pitchers.

Mind Gamer.description: Award when pitcher-disruption or plate-presence signals are clearly above average.

Sign Stealer.description: Award when pitch recognition and anticipation indicators are clearly above average.

Stimulated.description: Award when late-game performance trends are clearly above average.

Durable.description: Award when availability or durability is clearly above average.

Injury Prone.description: Award when availability or durability is clearly below average.

Bad Ball Hitter.description: Award when out-of-zone or difficult-contact ability is a clear strength.

Workhouse.description: Award when workload and stamina indicators are clearly above average.

Rally Stopper.description: Award when pitching with traffic on base is a clear strength.

Surrounded.description: Award when pitching with traffic on base is a clear weakness.

Composed.description: Award when three-ball command is clearly above average.

BB Prone.description: Award when three-ball command is clearly below average.

Metal Head.description: Award when recovery and resilience signals are clearly above average.

Elite 4F.description: Award when four-seam pitch quality is clearly above average.

Elite 2F.description: Award when two-seam fastball quality is clearly above average.

Elite CF.description: Award when cut fastball quality is clearly above average.

Elite CB.description: Award when curveball quality is clearly above average.

Elite CH.description: Award when changeup quality is clearly above average.

Elite FK.description: Award when forkball quality is clearly above average.

Elite SL.description: Award when slider quality is clearly above average.

Elite SB.description: Award when screwball quality is clearly above average.

Gets Ahead.description: Award when 0-0 count command is clearly above average.

Falls Behind.description: Award when 0-0 count command is clearly below average.

Pick Officer.description: Award when the running game is controlled especially well.

Easy Jumps.description: Award when the running game exploits the pitcher consistently.

Reverse Splits.description: Award when opposite-handed matchup performance is meaningfully better than same-handed matchup performance.

Specialist.description: Award when same-handed matchup performance is meaningfully better than opposite-handed matchup performance.

Meltdown.description: Award when collapse-risk indicators are clearly above average.

Wild Thing.description: Award when pitch-location volatility is clearly above average.

Crossed Up.description: Award when catcher-handling or sequencing risk is clearly above average.
